lists.title: Summerween ScorchFest: Homicide and High Tide
lists.description: I completed my first ever Hooptober last year along with my own personal challenge that highlights winter holiday horror called FrostFest and I was inspired to create another horror challenge for SUMMERWEEN! I will be updating my progress on my socials and substack! full article about my decisions with these entries up now on substack! Just like Hooptober and FrostFest, I challenge anyone who wants to join in with me and create their own list. I’ll create some easy rules and make sure to tag ‘scorchfest1’ so everyone can find lists and support each other (feel free to comment your lists below as well!) 🪓 See notes and tags…
